subcodes.first_line: All praise is befitting and meet unto the Lord of all desires, Who hath illumined the world with the lights of the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که عالم را بانوار شمس حقیقت منور فرمود و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
